name: markitdown
description: Browser extension to render Markdown files (Chromium-like and Firefox builds)

scripts.build:vendor: npm run build:marked && npm run build:hljs
scripts.build:chromium: npm run build:vendor && mkdir -p dist/chromium/vendor && cp -r icons src styles dist/chromium/ && cp vendor/marked.min.js vendor/hljs.min.js dist/chromium/vendor/ && cp build/manifest.chromium.json dist/chromium/manifest.json
scripts.build:firefox: npm run build:vendor && mkdir -p dist/firefox/vendor && cp -r icons src styles dist/firefox/ && cp vendor/marked.min.js vendor/hljs.min.js dist/firefox/vendor/ && cp build/manifest.firefox.json dist/firefox/manifest.json
scripts.build:all: npm run build:chromium && npm run build:firefox
scripts.package:chromium: npm run build:chromium && cd dist/chromium && zip -r ../../markitdown-$npm_package_version-chromium.zip .
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist/firefox && zip -r ../../markitdown-$npm_package_version-firefox.zip .
scripts.package:all: npm run clean && npm run package:chromium && npm run package:firefox
